extension.description: Search and download subtitles for movies and TV-Series from SubDL.com API.
Tìm kiếm và tải phụ đề phim, TV-Series chất lượng cao từ SubDL.com.
extension.disclaimer: You need to provide TMDB API Key and SubDL API Key in the add-on settings to use this service.
extension.news: v1.0.0 (New Release) - Initial release for SubDL Add-on - Fully rewritten from scratch to support SubDL and TMDB API - Optimized downloading and extracting mechanisms
